title: PNG Image
documentation:
## Purpose
Carries a PNG-encoded raster image with semantic context indicating it is an image ready for vision or display use. Distinguished from the bare [PNG Image](https://capdag.com/browse/media:png) type by the `image` tag, which makes routing to vision inference nodes explicit.

## When to use
Use `media:image;png` when a pipeline step expects a PNG specifically in the role of a visual artifact — for example as input to a vision model or image description node. For raw PNG bytes without semantic image context, use [PNG Image Data](https://capdag.com/browse/media:png).

## Notes
PNG supports lossless compression and alpha transparency, making it appropriate for screenshots, diagrams, and UI renderings. For photographic content where file size matters, prefer JPEG or WebP.
